zh:
一个故事，一碗汤
你只知道开头，却猜不到结局
加入想象的调料，还原完整的味道……
en:
A story, a bowl of soup.
You know the beginning, but never the ending.
Add a dash of imagination to savor the full flavor...

zh: 输入 DeepSeek API Key 驱动谜题生成与问答。Key 仅保存在你的浏览器本地。
en: Enter your DeepSeek API Key to power puzzle generation and Q&A. The key is stored only in your browser.

zh: 选择故事风格、推理类型与难度，智能体将据此生成专属汤底
en: Choose story style, reasoning type, and difficulty. Agent will generate a unique soup base.

zh: 限时竞速，在有限的时间内提问

在有限的时间内提问，
超时将被禁止提问。
en:
Ask questions within a limited time; 
timeout will disable further questions.

zh: 💀 时间耗尽！你的所有提问次数已被清零，请提交汤底。
en: 💀 Time's up! All questions cleared. Submit your answer.

zh: 强调逻辑闭环与现实约束
en: Emphasizes logical closure and real-world constraints

zh: 在这里定制你喜欢的故事内容和主题
en: Customize your preferred story content and themes here.

zh: 补充自定义风格，用逗号分隔
en: Add custom styles, separated by commas

zh: 输入你的问题，一次只问一个...
en: Ask one question at a time...

zh: 请输入你推理出的故事真相。
en: Enter the story truth you have deduced.

zh: 未配置 API Key 无法生成谜题。请先配置 API Key 后再试。
en: Cannot generate a mystery without an API Key. Please configure your API Key first.

zh: 主厨正在思考食谱中...(已经思考${seconds}秒)
en: The chef is thinking about the recipe... (${seconds}s elapsed)

zh: 主持人正在评估你的汤底，请稍候。
en: Host is evaluating your soup guess. Please wait.

zh: 是/不是/重要/不重要/是也不是/皆有可能/无法确定/不需要关心
一名店主把汤锅借给邻居，邻居误以为锅里剩下的是普通残汤，实际上里面封存着一段带有身份误认线索的真相。
en: A shop owner lends a pot to a neighbor. The neighbor mistakes the leftover liquid for ordinary broth, but it actually contains a truth tied to mistaken identity.

zh:
夜里，城南的小店忽然停了业。第二天一早，店主站在门口，脸色发白。

他对警察说：锅还在，汤却不见了。 旁人听完只觉得荒唐，可只有问到那口锅的人，才知道他为什么一直盯着厨房角落。
en:
Overnight, the little shop in the south of town suddenly closed. The next morning, the owner stood at the doorway, pale.

He told the police: The pot is still here, but the soup is gone. Everyone else thought it was absurd, but only the person who asked about the pot knew why he kept staring at the kitchen corner.

zh:
锅里的东西并不是普通食物，而是被用来保存信息的媒介。
真正的关键是时间差，不是失窃本身。
邻居和店主对同一件物品的理解并不一致。
气味、温度或残留痕迹会决定真相。
en:
What was in the pot was not ordinary food, but a medium for storing information.
The real key is the time gap, not the theft itself.
The neighbor and the owner understand the same object differently.
Smell, temperature, or residue will determine the truth.

zh: 店主用锅保存了与一宗旧案有关的证据，邻居借走后因为误判把证据处理掉，导致店主误以为被盗；真正的秘密藏在锅里残留的气味和时间线里。
en: The owner used the pot to store evidence tied to an old case. After the neighbor borrowed it
column5: making the owner think it was stolen. The real secret lies in the lingering scent and the timeline.

zh: 是/不是/重要/不重要/是也不是/皆有可能/无法确定/不需要关心

汤底完成，开始调味吧...
每次只能提出一个问题，主持人会告诉你是与否。
请在有限的提问次数里推理出真相。
en:
Broth's ready—time to season it...
You may only ask one question at a time; the system will answer yes or no.
Uncover the truth within your limited attempts..

zh:
时间正在流逝，若是不能尽快完成调味，美味将会转瞬即逝...
每次只能提出一个问题，主持人会告诉你是与否。
请在有限的提问次数里推理出真相。
en:
Time is running out—if you don't finish seasoning soon, the flavor will vanish in an instant...
You may only ask one question at a time; the system will answer yes or no.
Uncover the truth within your limited attempts.

zh: 未配置 API Key，已切换到本地演示模式。
en: No API key configured. Switched to local demo mode.

zh: 请输入一个问题后再发送。
你不能连续提问多个问题。但我可以先回答第一个问题：${followUp}
en: You cannot ask multiple questions at once. I can answer the first one: ${followUp}
please focus on the first one.

zh: 提问机会已用尽，请提交汤底。
en: No attempts left. Please submit your soup.

zh: 提问次数用尽，请提交汤底。
en: No questions left. Please submit your soup.

zh: 所有盘问点已发现，提交已解锁。

en: Please enter your soup guess first.

zh: 与官方汤底存在部分吻合。
本地模式下未调用 Agent 复核。
en: No Agent validation in local mode.

zh: 建议围绕关键盘问点整理时间线。
en: Try to align the timeline around the key clues.

zh: 无效的汤底文件，请检查文件格式。
en: Invalid soup file. Please check the file format.

zh: 导入失败，文件可能已损坏。
en: Import failed. The file may be corrupted.

zh: AI 引擎返回了错误，请检查网络或 API Key 后重试。
en: The AI engine returned an error. Please check your network or API Key and try again.

zh: 您的 API Key 已失效或余额不足，请更新 Key 后重试。
en: Your API Key is invalid or has insufficient balance. Please update it and try again.
Please wait a moment and try again.
